LanguageData.VRecyclingE_LargePollutionPump.descripti: A large, groundwater-filtering pump which slowly cleans large swathes of polluted terrain. The extracted pollution is formed into toxic wastepacks which must be hauled away.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_LargePollutionPump.label: large pollution pump
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_PollutionFastPump.descriptio: A rapidly-working, groundwater-filtering pump which cleans polluted terrain. The extracted pollution is formed into toxic wastepacks which must be hauled away. It requires a large amount of electricity to work, but it works extremely quickly.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_PollutionFastPump.label: pollution fastpump
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_WasteCrate.description: A hermetically sealed container that prevents toxic waste stored inside from dissolving and leaking into the environment. Can only hold a limited amount of waste. Does nothing to prevent the waste from burning.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_WasteCrate.label: waste crate
